Container.Name: openclaw
Container.Overview: Auto-containerized from https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw. Stack: Node.js / Next.js. Generated by TITAN Unraid Dockerizer v2.9. Auto-updates when upstream releases a new version via GitHub Actions.
Container.Description: openclaw — Node.js application (Next.js). Source: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw. Managed by TITAN Dockerizer v2.9.

Config.Name: AppData
Config.Description: Persistent application data for openclaw. Backed up with Unraid.

Config.Name: DATABASE_URL
Config.Description: PostgreSQL connection URL (matches the companion postgres container)

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: User ID. 99=nobody (Unraid default). Match with: id nobody

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID. 100=users (Unraid default). Match with: id nobody

Config.Name: UMASK
Config.Description: File creation mask. 022 = owner rw, group/other read-only.

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Timezone. Examples: Asia/Dubai, America/New_York, Europe/London, Asia/Riyadh
